hero.tagline: Your retreat on the Ria Formosa
hero.subtitle: 3-bedroom duplex villa in Cabanas de Tavira with stunning Ria Formosa views

home.ctaSubtitle: Book Villa Solria and enjoy the best of the Algarve with Ria Formosa views.

villa.title: The Villa
villa.subtitle: A carefully equipped 3-bedroom duplex villa for your perfect holiday
villa.description: Villa Solria is a 3-bedroom duplex villa located on the frontline of the Ria Formosa in Cabanas de Tavira. With two thoughtfully decorated floors, a rooftop terrace and garden with BBQ, it is the ideal retreat for families and groups of up to 6 guests.
villa.groundFloorDesc: Living room with fireplace, fully equipped kitchen, 1 bedroom with 2 single beds (90x200cm) and bathroom with shower.
villa.firstFloorDesc: Master suite with queen bed (160x200cm), crib and sea view balcony. Premium double room with double bed (140x200cm). Bathroom with shower.
villa.outdoorDesc: Rooftop sun deck with loungers and panoramic views, garden with BBQ, free parking.

rules.checkIn: Check-in: 4:00 PM (self check-in with digital lock)

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: In the heart of Cabanas de Tavira
location.aboutText: Cabanas de Tavira is a charming fishing village located in the Ria Formosa Natural Park. Known for its golden sand beaches, crystal-clear waters and peaceful atmosphere, it is the perfect destination for those seeking a relaxing holiday in the Algarve. The village offers excellent seafood restaurants, cozy cafes and a waterfront promenade with stunning views.

recommendations.beachesDesc: Cabanas Beach, Tavira Island, Barril Beach with the anchor cemetery
recommendations.restaurantsDesc: Fresh seafood at local restaurants, traditional taverns in Tavira
recommendations.activitiesDesc: Ria Formosa boat trips, kayaking, cycling, hiking in the natural park
recommendations.cultureDesc: Tavira historic center, Tavira Castle, Santa Maria Church, Roman Bridge

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Check-in is done via a digital smart lock. You will receive the access code by message before your arrival. Check-in is from 4:00 PM.
faq.a2: Villa Solria has free parking next to the property. The street is quiet and there is always a space available.
faq.a3: Cabanas Beach is just 700 meters away, about a 10-minute walk. It is a golden sand beach with calm waters, ideal for families.
faq.a4: Unfortunately, pets are not allowed at Villa Solria.
faq.q5: Does the villa have air conditioning?
faq.a5: Yes, all bedrooms and the living room have air conditioning.
faq.q6: How do I get to the villa from the airport?
faq.a6: Faro Airport is 53 km away (about 40 minutes by car). We recommend renting a car or booking a transfer. We can help arrange the transfer.
faq.a7: Yes, the kitchen is fully equipped with a stove, fridge, microwave, coffee machine, air fryer, toaster, dishwasher and all necessary utensils.
faq.a8: We offer free cancellation up to 14 days before check-in. Contact us for more details about the cancellation policy.
faq.a9: Yes, there are mini-markets in Cabanas de Tavira within a 5-minute walk. For larger shopping, there are supermarkets in Tavira (3.5 km).
faq.q10: Do you provide bed linen and towels?
faq.a10: Yes, all bed linen and towels are included. We also provide beach towels.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.subtitle: What our guests say
reviews.review1Text: Modern and comfortable house with a lovely terrace. The beds are great. The kitchen is small but functional and well equipped. Quiet location with wonderful views of the Ria.
reviews.review2Text: A very nice spacious house in a quiet cul-de-sac with a magnificent view of the Ria Formosa.
reviews.review3Text: Villa with all the amenities for a holiday. Well located, about a 10-minute walk from the center of Cabanas. The owner (Bruno) is always available and helpful.
